project_specification.overview: 2-3 sentences: what you're building, what problem it solves, who it's for.

prerequisites.environment_setup: - Python 3.12+ with uv installed - Node.js 18+ for frontend - Any required API keys (list here)

core_features.authentication: - User can register with email and password (returns 201 with user_id) - User can login and receive JWT access_token and refresh_token - User can logout and invalidate their refresh token - System rejects login with invalid credentials (returns 401) - User can refresh expired access token using refresh_token
core_features.core_functionality: - User can create a new item with title and description - User can view paginated list of their items (?page=1&per_page=20) - User can update an existing item's title or description - User can delete an item (soft delete — sets deleted_at) - System returns 403 if user tries to access another user's item
core_features.user_interface: - UI displays loading skeleton while data is fetching - UI shows success toast notification after create/update/delete - UI shows error message when API request fails - UI is responsive on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px)
core_features.api_layer: - API validates all request bodies and returns 400 for invalid input - API requires valid JWT for all protected routes (returns 401 if missing) - API returns paginated results with total count and next/prev links

tables.users: - id (PRIMARY KEY, UUID) - email (UNIQUE, NOT NULL) - password_hash (NOT NULL) - name - created_at, updated_at

ui_layout.main_structure: - Header with navigation and user menu - Sidebar for navigation (collapsible on mobile) - Main content area with page header and content

design_system.color_palette: - Primary: #f97316 (forge orange) - Secondary: #3b82f6 (blue) - Background: #ffffff (light) / #0f172a (dark) - Surface: #f8fafc (light) / #1e293b (dark) - Text: #0f172a (light) / #f1f5f9 (dark) - Error: #ef4444 - Success: #22c55e - Warning: #f59e0b
design_system.typography: - Font family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif - Headings: font-semibold - Body: font-normal, leading-relaxed - Code: JetBrains Mono, monospace
design_system.animations: - Transitions: 150-200ms ease - Loading: skeleton screens (not spinners) - Modals: fade + scale in

key_interactions.flow_registration: 1. User clicks "Sign up" 2. Fills email + password form 3. System creates account 4. Redirect to dashboard with welcome toast

step.title: Project Setup and Database
step.tasks: - Initialize frontend and backend projects - Create database schema and migrations - Set up environment variables and config - Configure CORS and middleware

step.title: Authentication System
step.tasks: - Implement JWT register/login/logout/refresh - Add session management and protected routes

step.title: Core Features
step.tasks: - Build primary CRUD operations - Implement list/pagination/filtering - Add form validation and error handling

step.title: UI Polish and Testing
step.tasks: - Responsive design and dark/light theme - Loading states, toasts, error feedback - Full test suite (≥90% coverage)

success_criteria.functionality: - All features in core_features are implemented and passing - No console errors in browser during normal use - Data persists correctly across sessions
success_criteria.user_experience: - Responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop - All async operations show loading states - Clear feedback for every user action
success_criteria.technical_quality: - Test coverage ≥ 90% - No TypeScript or mypy type errors - Proper error handling throughout
